cap: A pattern catalog (markdown write-ups) for multi-agent AI integration, each pattern backed by minimal reference implementations in 5 languages demonstrating the mechanism (e.g. circuit breaker, blackboard, scatter-gather, agent proxy) rather than production code.
a Claude Code PreToolUse hook that parses bash commands (via bashlex) and blocks dangerous patterns/path escapes before execution in unattended agent runs.

a feed-forward transformer model for streaming 3D reconstruction from video, with paged KV-cache attention for long sequences, an evaluation benchmark across 9 datasets, and offline rendering pipeline
an open-source world model / video generation system that generates long, interactive, camera- and action-controllable video simulations from an image and prompt
per-project micro-VM sandbox on macOS (Apple Virtualization Framework) with fast warm re-entry, explicit mounts, and reusable sessions for running coding agents

Rust server plus native macOS/iOS apps that run and orchestrate Claude Code and Codex sessions across multiple machines, with mission-control issue-driven dispatch, magit-style diff review, and mobile approvals

standalone Rust MCP server crate exposing a Convergio daemon's tools (solve/plan/execute workflow, natural-language CEO router) over stdio or streamable-HTTP, with a ring-based trust/permission model per tool

a CLI tool that chunks a text document, uses an LLM to extract subject-predicate-object triples, standardizes entity names, infers additional cross-chunk relationships, and renders an interactive HTML knowledge graph

a self-hostable ChatGPT-style multi-user chat app with an agentic tool-use harness (filesystem, shell, python/node exec, RAG search, subagents, checkpoints) running over any OpenAI-compatible or Bedrock model, plus an OpenAI-compatible API gateway with per-user/department cost accounting

A Dash web app that runs a fixed pipeline of specialized LLM agents (brainstorm -> phase -> design -> deploy-plan) to turn a rough idea or existing codebase into ordered, structured implementation phases, a UI mock, and a deployment plan, handed off to an external coding agent.

Pure-Rust ONNX neural network inference engine with CPU SIMD kernels (AVX2/AVX-512/Neon/WASM), int8 quantization support, a custom fast-loading .rten format, and WebAssembly bindings for running PyTorch-exported models in Rust or JS apps.

Local Claude Code runtime: a proxy translating Anthropic API calls to llama.cpp/MLX OpenAI-compatible local servers (big+small model split), plus a native macOS 'Studio' app for chat/config/logs/interactive permission approval and benchmarking harness comparing local vs baseline performance.

Claude Code/Cursor plugin implementing an 11-agent development pipeline (spec, design, build, blind-review, docs, commit, security) enforced via bash hooks, plus 'Atelier Brain' — a Postgres+pgvector persistent memory layer with conflict detection and decay across sessions.

Chrome extension + MCP server (with a Rust rewrite mid-project) that streams page content, DOM, console logs, network requests, performance and accessibility data from a live browser tab into Claude Code, exposed as 11 MCP tools including JS execution.
An MCP server exposing tools to search a maintained database of 1,500+ developer-tool free-tier/startup-credit offers by keyword, category, or eligibility, plus change-tracking and a REST API.
A library of markdown skill files that teach the Hermes AI agent how to call specific third-party APIs (FMP finance, Firecrawl, WordPress, waitlist, etc.), copied into ~/.hermes/skills/.

macOS menu-bar app that reads local credentials/keychain for AI coding subscriptions (Claude, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and displays session/weekly usage, spend, and quota resets with pinning and a local HTTP API.

platform running each user's personal AI agent in its own Firecracker microVM (sub-1.2s cold start) with persistent state, scheduler, memory index, and tool runtime, isolated from the host orchestrator via encrypted message blobs; includes example agent skills (canvas dashboards, image generation, design)
Neovim plugin providing ChatGPT-style chat sessions, instructable text/code operations, speech-to-text, and image generation via multiple LLM providers inside the editor

Rust client SDK + CLI for IICP, an intent-based routing protocol that discovers and calls AI inference/tool nodes across a decentralized mesh, with an OpenAI/Ollama/Anthropic-compatible local proxy gateway and self-updating provider-node binary.
An MCP server bridging Claude Desktop/Cursor to Roblox Studio via a companion plugin, exposing tools to run code, insert models, control play mode, and read console output inside Studio.

a TypeScript composition library where LLM calls, tool calls, and plain functions are all typed Step<i,o> values, wired together with 18 composition primitives (sequence, parallel, branch, retry, ensemble, adversarial, checkpoint, suspend, etc.), fronting 8 provider adapters through one generate surface, with an MCP client/server bridge and pluggable trajectory/checkpoint adapters
reference websocket policy server/client harness that lets researchers serve a trained robot-manipulation policy and have it evaluated remotely by the RoboArena benchmark

RoboCasa-based MuJoCo simulation environments and eval harness for 24 tabletop manipulation tasks used to benchmark NVIDIA's GR00T-N1.5 humanoid foundation model, including demo playback, teleop-dataset support, and closed-loop policy evaluation
a real-time transformer-based object detection/instance-segmentation/keypoint-detection model family (DINOv2 backbone) with training, ONNX/TensorRT/TFLite export, and inference APIs
reusable computer-vision tools for sports analytics: player/ball/pitch-keypoint detection helpers and view-transform (homography) utilities demonstrated on soccer/basketball

a model-agnostic computer-vision toolkit providing detection/annotation/tracking primitives (sv.Detections), annotators, dataset loaders/converters, and metrics that plug into any detector (YOLO, DETR, transformers, etc.)

plug-and-play multi-object tracking (SORT, ByteTrack, OC-SORT, BoT-SORT, C-BIoU) that consumes supervision.Detections from any detector, with a CLI for tracking video/streams and Optuna-based hyperparameter tuning

A ROS2-integrated agent framework giving robots LLM/VLM-driven reasoning, tool-calling over ROS2 topics/services/actions, speech I/O, object detection/segmentation, and a benchmarking suite for manipulation and tool-calling tasks.

MCP server bridging LLMs to ROS/ROS2 robots via rosbridge WebSocket: exposes topics, services, actions, params, and node discovery as MCP tools/resources so an agent can both observe and control real or simulated robots.
a unified simulation platform/benchmark spanning many robot simulators and task suites (LIBERO, RoboTwin, etc.) with multi-agent-native trajectory datasets for imitation and RL.
a hobbyist-robotics tutorial repo teaching hexapod leg kinematics, servo calibration, and HID gamepad control via Jupyter notebooks and Python scripts

USPTO patent-drafting system: MCP server + Claude Code plugin providing hybrid RAG search over MPEP/USC/CFR, BigQuery access to 76M+ patents, automated 35 USC 112 compliance checks, prior-art search, and diagram generation via specialized subagents

A local multi-agent orchestrator CLI/web-UI: a conductor model decomposes a mission into parallel worker tasks with a shared blackboard, adversarial verification, resumable crash-safe journaling, and a dedicated 'code mode' build doctrine (recon->scaffold->disjoint-file implement->integration test->green-gate->commit) with git-worktree best-of-N ensembles and a no-stub completeness scanner.

a Claude Code/Codex slash-command plugin that recons a codebase, decomposes a task into adaptive phases, writes ROADMAP/STATE/phase-spec files to disk, then runs those phases autonomously via a single pasted /goal command with retry, fix-spec recovery, and a final gap-auditing pass
native desktop app that reads/edits Claude Code's scattered MCP config files (~/.claude.json, .mcp.json, settings), shows per-server health, and toggles/adds/removes servers across scopes

A visual AI/data-pipeline builder (VS Code extension + web canvas) backed by a multithreaded C++ runtime, with 50+ Python-extensible pipeline nodes (LLM providers, vector DBs, OCR, agents) executing portable JSON pipeline definitions, plus Python/TypeScript SDKs and an MCP server.

declarative-YAML E2E test framework where a Temporal-orchestrated engine runs plugin steps (HTTP, Playwright browser, SQL, Supabase, shell) including an 'agent' plugin that asks an LLM to visually verify assertions in a live browser session, with retries, lifecycle hooks, and a hosted run history/console

A model-agnostic, MCP-native wrapper around the Goose agent runtime that exposes a fixed 9-tool research action space (fetch/run/read/write/search/submit) for long-horizon unattended research agents, plus an evaluation harness with graded probe transcripts.

Electron desktop app orchestrating a 3-tier agent system (decision/execution/supervision) to turn novels/scripts into short-drama storyboards, images and video via pluggable model vendors (DashScope, OpenAI, MiniMax, Kling, Vidu, etc)
A CLI that takes a natural-language agent description, calls an LLM backend (Claude/Grok/OpenAI) to generate a Pydantic-validated CrewAI YAML config, and can save/run/manage it from an agent library.

kbench: a benchmark runner that attaches kimetsu (a local-first memory MCP sidecar) to Claude Code and Codex, runs them head-to-head against un-augmented baselines on Terminal-Bench tasks via Harbor/Docker, plus kstress for brain-scale stress testing and LongMemEval/BrainBench drivers
An OpenCode plugin that starts a persistent timer, blocks sleep commands, injects rotating system-prompt reminders, and rejects the agent's checkout/stop call until the timer reaches zero.

A single Go binary that wraps existing coding-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Kimi, Ollama) in a deterministic plan-execute-verify loop: plan-as-contract enforcement, sensors/gates, SQLite-backed trajectory + memory store, multi-agent blackboard orchestration, and an HITL-gated self-evolution loop that proposes/sandboxes/promotes changes to itself.

MCP server giving an LLM read/write access to a personal WhatsApp account (search/send/read messages and media, group management) via a local whatsmeow bridge storing data in SQLite, plus opt-in voice-message transcription

A CLI + registry that installs and syncs MCP server configs across 19 different AI apps (Claude, Cursor, VS Code, Goose, Codex, etc.), translating one canonical server definition into each app's config format/location.

NestJS backend exposing an MCP server that serves a curated corpus of architecture/coding-rule markdown files (BM25 + vector hybrid search) and installs/configures itself into multiple coding-agent CLIs (Claude, Qwen, Cursor, Gemini, OpenCode)
a self-hostable pub/sub broadcast hub where AI agents publish structured, LLM-enriched content and receive personalized, vector+BM25-matched feeds of relevant broadcasts from other agents
Next.js/FastAPI education web app using a team of specialized LangGraph agents (teach, assess, remember via GraphRAG memory, adapt) to run personalized lessons, deployed on Vercel with CI.

demo/reference architecture wiring a Copilot Studio Computer-Use agent to drive a legacy Win32 desktop app via screen-click automation on a Windows 365 Cloud PC, orchestrated by an Azure Functions handoff service with full screenshot audit trail

Converts PDFs, Office docs, images, code, and notebooks into clean LLM-friendly markdown, using Qwen2.5-VL vision models (local or cloud) for image/scanned-PDF understanding with dynamic batching of pages, plus a CLI and Gradio web UI.

CLI/library that normalizes trace events from three different coding-agent frameworks (Claude Code via hooks, OpenClaw via cache-trace file watching, ArtifactTrace via direct import) into one file-centric JSONL+SQLite trace format, enabling cross-framework session chaining
Nix packaging/build repo that vendors and builds Dicklesworthstone/mcp_agent_mail_rust (an MCP server for agent-to-agent mail) as the `am` binary, alongside several vendored sibling Rust libraries.
a proxy server (Node or Python) that sits between an agent and an OpenAI-compatible API, hashes requests, and serves cached JSON responses for repeated computer-use/agent workflows

bare-metal Rust inference engine implementing PagedAttention KV-cache paging, continuous batching, int8 quantization, a wgpu GPU matvec kernel, and n-gram speculative decoding for Llama 3.2 1B, with an OpenAI-compatible HTTP server

single-binary in-memory data store speaking the Redis RESP2 protocol, with added vector search, a semantic-cache command (SCACHE) backed by an embeddings provider, and a built-in MCP server exposing the store as an agent tool

a persistent memory server (SQLite-backed, hybrid BM25+vector search) with an MCP tool surface and hooks that inject/capture memories across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and other coding-agent sessions

a 503-lesson, 20-phase AI-engineering curriculum (Python/TypeScript/Rust/Julia) where each lesson ships a runnable code artifact, docs page, and quiz, plus scripts that generate agent/skill/MCP-server outputs
Parses local Claude Code session JSONL files and scraped /usage output to compute cost/token/session stats, then posts them to a TRMNL e-ink display via webhook or an iii-engine worker.

an MCP server exposing Kubernetes operations (diagnostics, deploy, cost optimization, security audit, Helm, GitOps, multi-cluster) as natural-language-drivable tools, plus a bundled library of 24+ agent skill files for common k8s workflows and interactive dashboard UIs.

a Claude Code plugin bundling 34 skills, 8 subagents, 22 commands, and 37 hook scripts around a SQLite store that captures user corrections as reusable rules and grows FTS5-indexed research wikis via an auto-research loop

a cost-control control plane that discovers running coding-agent processes (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, etc.), tracks spend/budget in real time, detects runaway loops, wraps processes with a kill switch, and compresses MCP tool output — via CLI, TUI, web UI, and desktop app sharing one engine.

Cross-agent package manager for AI coding-agent skills: installs/translates skills between 46 different agent formats (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.), with marketplace search, security scanning, session memory, and a peer mesh for agent messaging.
publishes a full Claude Code web chat UI over Tailscale/Funnel, proxying to the Claude Code CLI with SSE streaming, session history, cost/usage dashboards, and system metrics.
a CLI + Claude Code skill that wraps the X/Twitter API for search, thread/profile fetching, and watchlist monitoring, with local file-based caching and cost-transparency reporting per query

a YAML/Markdown specification format (Soul.md) for declaring an AI agent's persona (voice, interaction policy, safety posture) separately from its tools/config, with composition via extends/mixins and profile switching
Django app combining a local Ollama model-manager UI, a face-recognition module, and a GraphRAG pipeline over PDF documents with cached entity-extraction and generated knowledge-graph artifacts.
Multi-agent robot interaction system coordinating face-recognition, Chinese speech recognition, and speech synthesis agents over a custom MCP-named protocol, with a live web dashboard.

a Go template running an Eino ReAct loop with CLI/Discord adapters, tool set (web search, http fetch, calculator, scheduler, reminders), and a background sweeper that distills conversation history into long-term memory files

Go control-plane hub + MLLP server/client that translates a neutral canonical patient model to/from HL7 ADT messages, with a Claude vision agent that reverse-engineers new EMR connectors from screenshots into a declarative ConnectorSpec.
Claude Code plugin that shells out to Google's Antigravity `agy` CLI in print mode, relays its answer back into Claude Code, and logs each run with per-job status lookup.

An OpenCode plugin that reads Claude Code's `.claude/settings.json` hook definitions (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, etc.) and executes the same command/http/prompt/agent hook handlers inside OpenCode's plugin lifecycle, including blocking and input-mutation.
Rust library distributing LLM inference layers across a P2P mesh of heterogeneous consumer devices, with encrypted/compressed KV-cache handoff between pipeline stages via libp2p

six Claude/Codex/Cursor-compatible skill bundles (accountant, tax auditor, notary, personal-tax, condo-syndic, statutory auditor) encoding French bureaucratic domain knowledge (PCG, TVA, CGI, BOFiP) plus bank/payment connectors and an eval suite scoring skill-assisted vs unassisted output
A GLM/Claude-skill package of Python scripts that scaffold a repo from a template, generate tests, wire GitHub Actions CI/CD, and run conventional-commit/release automation from one prompt.

CLI that runs coding-agent CLIs (Claude Code, Codex, goose, opencode) as stateless workers inside a restart-safe Supervisor→Executor→Reviewer loop, with SQLite run state, worktree isolation, and configurable check gates.

Rust MCP client+server SDK with proc-macro-based tool/resource/prompt definitions, stdio and streamable-HTTP transports, bearer-token auth/RBAC, and structured-output validation, tracking the latest MCP spec including experimental features (tasks, elicitation).

TS library that parses HTML DOM into an AST and renders semantic Markdown, with main-content detection, metadata extraction, and URL refification to cut token usage.

Local proxy/relay that discovers a user's existing AI subscription credentials (Claude Desktop, Kiro, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.) and 45+ direct API providers, then re-routes any CLI/IDE tool's requests through whichever quota is available, with failover across providers.

full coding-agent harness (VS Code extension + standalone CLI) with mode switching (Code/Architect/Ask/Debug), MCP tool use, checkpoints, worktrees, custom modes, and multi-language docs

A curated, versioned corpus of 883+ agent skills (SKILL.md files, some with executable helper scripts) installable via npm across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI and Copilot, with catalog generation, security auditing and bundle grouping tooling.

CLI + LSP + SQLite registry for installing, composing, and running 'harness' packages (bundled prompts, memory schema, MCP tool config, TDD validators) that configure a local-model coding assistant for a specific role

a local-first, modular AI agent framework (core loop + toggleable Python-class modules for memory, scheduler, sandboxed shell, characters) reachable via WebUI, CLI, Telegram, Discord, or Matrix, aimed at personal life-management use

Cross-agent session-persistence tool: hooks into Claude Code and Cursor to append every tool action to a per-directory JSONL event log, renders a lossless human-readable handoff.md, and auto-injects prior context at session start with secret redaction.
Flask app running a LangGraph pipeline of specialized sub-agents that search news, curate, write, critique, design, and publish a personalized newspaper.

Open evaluation platform and leaderboard for LLM routers, benchmarking 9 domains/44 categories on accuracy, cost, optimal-selection, latency, and robustness, with an automated PR-based submission pipeline.

Go framework for building cyclic/DAG agent workflows: a Brain of Neuron compute units linked by sequential/parallel/branch/loop Links, with in-memory or SQLite-backed memory and a cgo bridge to run Python Processors inside a Go-defined graph.

Self-hosted multi-bot AI-agent hub that routes Telegram/Discord messages over NATS to isolated per-scope agent worker pools (CLI subprocess or RPC backend), with a 5-level memory hierarchy, voice I/O, and a React ops dashboard.

npx CLI that detects installed coding-agent CLIs (Gemini, Copilot, Claude Code, Aider, Kimi, Cursor) and generates OpenCode Agent Skill files plus opencode.json routing config so OpenCode delegates tasks to the best-suited sub-agent CLI.

a Claude-Code-plugin CLI that chains OpenSpec (spec lifecycle/proposals/archiving) and Superpowers (design/planning/execution) skills into a resumable 5-phase pipeline tracked in a .comet.yaml state file, with a web dashboard
ground-up Rust OS (UEFI boot, capability-secured microkernel, GPU-composited desktop) with an on-device deterministic inference engine that feeds telemetry to a kernel scheduler orchestrator

local-first RAG app indexing code/docs/PDFs into ChromaDB with hybrid BM25+vector retrieval and RRF fusion, served via Streamlit chat UI
cron-driven scraper (REST + Playwright) collecting AI-company job postings across 7 Chinese firms, diffing daily snapshots and pushing reports/notifications

A single-binary (15MB) Rust agent runtime with persistent three-layer memory (redb+tantivy+hnsw), 13 messaging-channel integrations, 15 LLM providers, a cap-protocol bridge to external coding agents (Claude Code/OpenCode/Codex), A2A cross-machine orchestration, and 36 built-in tools including browser/computer-use automation.

runs four LangGraph-orchestrated LLM agents (parser, quality, security, performance) over an uploaded code zip, with security-to-quality inter-agent messaging, RAG-based rule retrieval, and a web UI producing a scored review report.

Large curated skill library (code generators, reviewers, ASO/App-Store workflow skills) for Claude Code targeting iOS/macOS/watchOS/visionOS development, paired with sibling repos for workflow commands, action agents, and App Store Connect MCP integration.

A Claude Code plugin marketplace providing slash commands (/specify, /implement, /validate, /test, /review) and subagent personas (the-architect, the-developer, etc.) that implement a PRD-to-code spec-driven workflow with tiered decomposition.

terminal coding agent with Architect/Code modes, multi-LLM-provider support (Gemini/OpenAI/Claude/Deepseek/Groq/Ollama/OpenRouter), tree-sitter-based code-definition search, ripgrep-based codebase search, and diff-based file edits

Personal AI-assistant app with Live2D avatar, streaming tool-calls, a memory graph, voice interaction, screen-vision game-state detection, and an embedded openclaw agent runtime.

A single-binary, zero-dependency permanent memory store for AI agents, exposed natively as MCP, with store/recall/wake-up/forget commands backed by SQLite and benchmarked via parallel agent simulations for latency, dedup and recall correctness.
A CLI proxy sitting in front of coding-agent shell commands that truncates/compresses tool output to cut LLM token usage 60-90%.

A Go orchestrator that bundles and launches a hardened OpenCode TUI driven by a local llama.cpp/Ollama model over loopback only, adding air-gap hardening, an intent-tracking layer (rtmx) for closing one requirement at a time, audit/metrics, host calibration, and packaging — without forking OpenCode.

Standalone AI agent runtime (FastAPI backend + React/Vite frontend) with sandboxed local Python code execution, SSE streaming chat, chain-of-thought display, and a pluggable workflow-registration interface for custom multi-step tasks.

An autonomous research agent that designs and runs its own experiments (via a task zoo with provenance-tracked eval scripts) and iteratively optimizes toward a goal.
